purpose: Manual review of donor changes since the last local Unica skill adaptation. This is not a checksum attestation.
summary: cc-1c-skills still has substantial upstream drift since the local v9 adaptation: 541 commits, 70 watched changed paths, 38 affected Unica skills remain after the web-test and SKD ports.
ai-rules-1c has guidance drift since the local v17/v18 adaptation window: 23 commits, 36 watched changed paths, 17 affected Unica skills.
v8-runner-rust runtime-contract drift from locked v0.5.0 to upstream v0.5.1 was reviewed and applied; the current tool lock baseline is v0.5.1.
web-test donor updates were reviewed and ported through the Unica packaging boundary; its entry baseline is now ae8241237753850307d94b10df93e5293e29dc74.

SKD donor updates were reviewed and ported through typed unica.skd.* with hidden legacy adapters for the full donor script contract; the skd-* entry baselines are now ae8241237753850307d94b10df93e5293e29dc74.

decisionPolicy.baselineRule: Move an entry baseline only after the corresponding local skill adaptation or explicit ignore decision is reviewed.

queues.skills: all remaining affected entries from upstreams[].affectedEntries

upstreams.baselineReason: Donor head at or before local adaptation commit 795505f2243cf3c93a95918467f99135af758e1b (2026-05-04T07:38:11+07:00).
upstreams.finding: High-impact drift remains after web-test and SKD were reviewed and ported. Remaining donor work is concentrated in form compile/edit/info/validate, metadata/form DSL references, and one-file command-surface updates. Do not update the shared baseline until these diffs are reviewed skill-by-skill.

entryDecisions.evidence: Local web-test skill now contains donor regression mode, split runner modules, CLI test runner, DOM/grid/spreadsheet engine changes, and Unica-specific URL/bootstrap guidance.
Local SKD compile now exposes the donor DSL additions through unica.skd.compile, refreshed SKD/DCS references, updated parity fixture, and hidden implementation script outside prompt-visible skills.
Local SKD edit now covers hidden/always/value-list parameters, availableValue replacement, multi-value defaults, query round-trip, and @once patch-query through unica.skd.edit.
Local SKD info now exposes Raw query export for exact set-query round-trip through typed boolean Raw in unica.skd.info.
Local SKD validate now uses the updated donor validation implementation through hidden Unica routing and updated parity fixture.

upstreams.baselineReason: Latest donor commit before local guidance adaptation commits 40d86774d8c21f41c1adeecec696abb039c9bda2 and e5b4eeab4dac92e0c9f60d3f886aa2bb7ef79f80 (2026-05-04).
upstreams.finding: Guidance drift affects all tracked ai-rules-derived skills. Notable additions include MCP-first search guidance, verification/checkmcp/doctor commands, async jobs, locks and transactions, logging, DCS, extension patterns, and updated mcp-1c-tools docs.

upstreams.baselineReason: Bundled tool baseline from third-party/tools.lock.json, sourceTag v0.5.1.
upstreams.finding: Reviewed v0.5.1 runtime changes. It adds a version command and keeps partial-load/build behavior inside the runner contract; Unica MCP still uses typed unica.runtime.execute without new raw flags.

completedQueues.notes: Ported regression runner, split CLI/DOM/engine modules, grid pagination, picture columns, spreadsheet drill-down, multi-context tests, and report formats; adapted bootstrap guidance to Unica autonomous-server and removed prompt-visible donor URLs.

Ported SKD DSL/reference updates, Raw query export, value-list/availableValue parameter editing, @once patch-query, and donor-compatible SKD scripts behind typed unica.skd.* hidden legacy adapters; no donor URLs or raw script routing were added to prompt-visible skills.
